objective: Prioritize expansion conversations and preserve an auditable activation plan
executive_brief: A newly announced regional expansion creates a time-bound operating-leadership conversation.
Acme Health is the highest-rated account at 88/100 with verified first-party evidence.
Jordan Lee is the strongest person route, but event coattendance must not be described as a personal relationship.
The competitive opening is Northstar's implementation model rather than generic strategy positioning.
Request an account-owner review this week before drafting outreach.

data_health.protected_field_policy: Human-owned opportunity and suppression fields are review-only.

accounts.name: Acme Health
accounts.why_now: Announced a regional operating expansion on 2026-07-01.
accounts.angle: Test whether leadership capacity is keeping pace with the operating footprint.
risks: Expansion scope may change before implementation.

next_action.action: Review the expansion thesis and approve a discovery draft

people.name: Jordan Lee
people.why_now: Public leadership page assigns the regional operating remit to Jordan.
people.angle: Ask which constraint must change first as the region launches.
people.contact_route: Company contact form; no direct email inferred.

next_action.action: Verify remit and prepare a review-only conversation draft

relationships.activation_path: Reference the published forum theme without implying that the two people met.

signals.title: Regional operating footprint announced
signals.relationship_context: One verified event-coattendance edge with explicit limitations.
signals.why_it_changes_the_call: The call can test a dated operating mandate rather than generic transformation interest.
signals.conversation_angle: Ask which operating bottleneck has become critical because of the regional launch.
signals.verification_task: Recheck the launch page before any outreach.

public_examples.demonstration_value: Shows an implementation-led expansion model without claiming a private result.

conversation_kits.context: Acme Health announced a dated regional launch.
conversation_kits.hypothesis: The launch may create a leadership-capacity constraint.
conversation_kits.proof: Northstar's public case material describes implementation support for regional operating changes.
questions: Which operating constraint must change before launch?
Where is leadership capacity most exposed?
conversation_kits.objection_response: A short diagnostic can determine whether outside support is useful before any larger commitment.
conversation_kits.cta: Agree to a 20-minute diagnostic after account-owner review.

competitors.name: Status quo / internal team
competitors.where_client_wins: Adds implementation capacity during a time-bound launch.
competitors.reframe: Compare time-to-operating-readiness rather than advisory day rates.

unknowns.question: Who owns the expansion budget?
unknowns.verification_task: Confirm through account-owner review or a public filing.

applications.name: Weekly expansion radar
applications.input_scope: ICP-fit accounts with changed public operating signals
applications.review_gate: Account owner approves the target and angle.

discovery_scope.objective: Prioritize supplied people while reusing company results.

context_budget.cache_policy: Reuse fresh identities and refresh only volatile decision fields.

context_operations.natural_language_job: Extract the expansion date, operating scope, and named leaders from the first-party announcement with claim-level evidence.

body.instructions: Return only expansion date, scope, and named leaders.

context_operations.expected_response: Schema-conforming fields with claim-level source evidence.
context_operations.opulent_route: Corroborate the extracted delta, add relationship context, score, and route to account-owner review.
